name: Add a question
about: Suggest an AI PM interview question (real or representative)
title: "[Question] <short summary>"
labels: question
---

## The question
<!-- Paste the question verbatim if it's real; paraphrase if representative. -->

## Category
<!-- product-sense / technical-fluency / metrics / ai-specific-cases / behavioral -->

## Provenance (required)
- [ ] ✅ **Reported** — asked in a real loop. Source URL: <!-- required for Reported -->
- [ ] 🔮 **Representative** — synthesized from patterns; not a verbatim quote

## Difficulty
<!-- 🟢 Tier 1 (foundational) / 🟡 Tier 2 (core) / 🔴 Tier 3 (senior) -->

## Company / round (if known)
<!-- e.g. Meta — Product Sense with AI; OpenAI — HM deep dive -->

## If multiple-choice, the options + per-option "why"
<!-- Mark the correct option ✅. Every option needs a one-line reason, including the wrong ones. -->

- ✅ …  — *why this is right*
- ▫️ …  — *why this is a trap*
- ▫️ …  — *why this is a trap*

## The strong-answer shape (optional but appreciated)
<!-- Lead with the cost-of-error tail; name a specific metric + failure mode + user. -->

---
- [ ] I've labeled provenance honestly (not marking a synthesized question as Reported)
- [ ] The source URL is included if this is Reported
